item.title: UPS Is Closing Package Facilities: See the List of Doomed Locations Across Several States in 2026
item.description: After announcing mass layoffs in January, the shipping giant has disclosed in a court filing almost two dozen facilities marked for closure.

item.title: Alysa Liu’s Viral Olympic Comeback Proves 1 Thing: Authenticity Sells. So Where Are the Sponsors?
item.description: The figure skater has captured the internet’s heart. Brands should be lining up.

item.title: Apple’s Emergency SOS Helped Save 6 Skiers After California’s Deadliest Avalanche—Here’s How to Use It Yourself
item.description: It allowed skiers to connect with rescuers via satellite.

item.title: New Research Says Rural Internet Service Could Be Holding Your Company Back
item.description: In a digital world, even rural employees’ well-being is impacted by internet accessibility and quality.

item.title: Your Biggest Threat Is Obscurity
item.description: The existence of similar businesses won’t sink you. Being unknown will.
